title: dodecatheon clevelandii var. gracile
intro: Dodecatheon clevelandii var. gracile, also known as the slender shooting star, is a perennial plant species belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of iridoids and other bioactive compounds. Consuming Dodecatheon clevelandii var. gracile is said to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
